---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected?

## 🎯 Goal

What outcome should this feature achieve?

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

Describe the change you want in enough detail for implementation discussion.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

List alternatives, trade-offs, and why they were not selected.

## 📐 Scope

What is in scope and what is out of scope?

## 👥 Users / Use Cases

Who benefits from this feature? Include concrete usage examples.

## 📊 Expected Impact

- Detection quality impact:
- Performance impact:
- Security impact:
- Maintenance complexity:

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria (Optional)

Example:

- [ ] Feature can be enabled/configured
- [ ] Output is visible in reports/UI
- [ ] Backward compatibility preserved

## 🖼️ Additional Context

Attach references, mockups, sample output, or related issues.
